basic_details.job_title: IIM Guwahati Stores & Purchase Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati) Stores & Purchase Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Guwahati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Guwahati Stores & Purchase Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be provided as per GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Management, Administration, Commerce or related field with atleast 8 years of experience in the role of Stores & Purchase
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Management, Administration, Commerce or related field with atleast 8 years of experience in the role of Stores & Purchase. Knowledge and experience in Govt./ PSU/ central autonomous bodies in similar roles is preferred. It is desirable that the applicant should have the working knowledge of ERP, GeM portal, GFR 2017, FR & SR and relevant Central Government rules and procedures.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Guwahati Stores & Purchase Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Stores & Purchase Officer position at IIM Guwahati is 06-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Stores & Purchase Officer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Master’s degree in Management, Administration, Commerce, or a related field, along with at least 8 years of experience in Stores & Purchase roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Stores & Purchase Officer post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Stores & Purchase Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Stores & Purchase Officer position will be as per Pay Level 08 under the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Stores & Purchase Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Stores & Purchase Officer post at IIM Guwahati.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. Is experience in government or PSU sectors preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, knowledge and experience in Government/PSU/Central Autonomous Bodies in similar roles are preferred for this position.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable skills for the Stores & Purchase Officer role?
faq.answer: It is desirable for applicants to have working knowledge of ERP, GeM portal, GFR 2017, FR & SR, and relevant Central Government rules and procedures.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
